attributes.action: We Must Remain A Sovereign Nation! Under One Flag, The Union Flag!
attributes.additional_details: Parliament, must uphold the democratic decision that the British people voted to Leave the European Union in 2016! Allowing us to be a Sovereign, British, nation once again!
attributes.background: Members of Parliament, must take a stand and protect the British people from a Government that is trying to tie us back into the European (Government) Union! We voted for the democratic right to Leave the EU, the decision to Leave should be Honoured and upheld by all MP’s!

rejection.details: We find this petition unclear.  We're not sure what changes you'd like to see to current government policy.
